info.name: Juice for Teams
info.description: Complete API collection for the Juice for Teams Next.js app (Vercel) and direct Supabase REST access for data-audit. Generated by scripts/postman-sync.js

variable.description: Next.js app URL (local or Vercel)
Supabase project URL — Settings → API → Project URL
The xxxx part of your supabase_url (used to build cookie name)
Service-role secret key — Settings → API → service_role (keep secret!)
Anon/publishable key — Settings → API → anon public
Admin user email — used by pre-request auto sign-in
Admin user password — used by pre-request auto sign-in
Matches CRON_SECRET env var
Auto-populated by pre-request script — do not edit
Auto-populated by pre-request script — do not edit
Auto-populated by pre-request script
UUID of a real lead row — paste from Supabase Direct queries
UUID of a real subscription row
UUID of a real address row
UUID from auth.users (use GET /api/admin/contacts)
UUID of a subscription (admin opportunities view)
UUID of a real email_campaigns row
UUID of a real email_automation_rules row
Generic UUID used by Supabase Direct single-row GETs

item.name: 🔑 Auth
item.description: Sign in to get a session. The pre-request script on the Authenticated and Admin folders does this automatically — use these manually if needed.

item.name: 📊 Supabase Direct (data-audit)
item.description: Direct PostgREST queries using the service-role key — bypasses all RLS. Use for data audit, debugging, and admin queries.

item.name: email_logs
item.description: public.email_logs — every email sent by the system

item.name: SQL RPC
item.description: Direct SQL execution via the admin_exec_query function

item.name: 🌐 App API — Public
item.description: No authentication required. These are the funnel capture endpoints.

variable.description: Lead UUID

item.name: 🔐 App API — Authenticated
item.description: Requires a valid user session. Pre-request script auto-signs in using admin_email + admin_password.

variable.description: Subscription UUID
Address UUID
Address UUID
Stripe Checkout Session ID

exec: // Auto sign-in: exchanges admin_email + admin_password for a Supabase session
// and stores the result as the auth cookie used by the Next.js app routes.
// @supabase/ssr reads the session cookie as URL-encoded JSON
console.error('Auth pre-request failed', err, res && res.code);

item.name: 🔑 App API — Admin
item.description: Requires admin session (ADMIN_EMAILS env var). Pre-request script auto-signs in as admin_email.

variable.description: auth.users UUID

item.name: 🤖 Internal
item.description: Cron jobs and Stripe webhooks. These use special auth (Bearer cron_secret or Stripe signature).
